testcase.name: test_edition_validation
testcase.failure:
self = <tests.test_openlibrary.TestOpenLibrary testMethod=test_edition_validation>
def test_edition_validation(self): author = self.ol.Author('OL123A', 'Test Author') edition = self.ol.Edition( edition_olid='OL123M', work_olid='OL123W', title='Test Title', type={'key': '/type/edition'}, revision=1, last_modified={ 'type': '/type/datetime', 'value': '2016-10-12T00:48:04.453554', }, authors=[author], ) schema = { 'edition_olid': {'type': 'string', 'required': True}, 'work_olid': {'type': 'string'}, 'title': {'type': 'string', 'required': True}, 'type': {'type': 'dict', 'schema': {'key': {'type': 'string'}}}, 'revision': {'type': 'integer'}, 'last_modified': {'type': 'dict', 'schema': {'type': {'type': 'string'}, 'value': {'type': 'string'}}}, 'authors': {'type': 'list', 'schema': {'type': 'dict', 'schema': {'key': {'type': 'string'}}}}, } v = cerberus.Validator(schema) > self.assertTrue(v.validate(edition.json())) E AssertionError: False is not true
tests/test_openlibrary.py:259: AssertionError

testcase.name: test_work_validation
testcase.failure:
self = <tests.test_openlibrary.TestOpenLibrary testMethod=test_work_validation>
def test_work_validation(self): work = self.ol.Work( 'OL123W', title='Test Title', type={'key': '/type/work'}, revision=1, last_modified={ 'type': '/type/datetime', 'value': '2016-10-12T00:48:04.453554', }, ) schema = { 'title': {'type': 'string', 'required': True}, 'type': {'type': 'dict', 'schema': {'key': {'type': 'string'}}}, 'revision': {'type': 'integer'}, 'last_modified': {'type': 'dict', 'schema': {'type': {'type': 'string'}, 'value': {'type': 'string'}}}, } v = cerberus.Validator(schema) > self.assertTrue(v.validate(work.json())) E AssertionError: False is not true
tests/test_openlibrary.py:213: AssertionError
